rows.label: qev075405_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey! There was a huge
noise, what on earth is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Eh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0003
rows.name: Wh-Why is Tolba here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0004
rows.name:
I got captured by a suspicious Earthling here. I
managed to escape when they let their guard down,
but... I never thought I'd run into Master.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0005
rows.name:
But Tolba... You were eaten
right in front of my eyes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0006
rows.name:
That's right, that's why I...
carried the weight of your life
and vowed to wipe out the Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'm not so soft as to be
done in by a guy like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hehehe! I've gotten a little stronger
since then! Master, please look at the
results of my training a little![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0009
rows.name: Ah... Yeah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0010
rows.name: Hey, [ST:playername]... What on earth is going on?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_JNK0010
rows.name: Rejoice[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_SEL0011
rows.name: Honestly rejoice that Tolba is alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_SEL0021
rows.name: Warn Gi Zang that Tolba definitely died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0011
rows.name:
...You're right. He's standing
right in front of me... There's
no need to doubt it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'm glad, Tolba. I'm sick and
tired of someone dying or failing
to be protected because of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm just glad that you
at least survived...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hehe! This is the result of my
training! Goodbye, Master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0015
rows.name:
To fall for such a simple trap, the
Lars are truly foolish, aren't they![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0016
rows.name: Hehe... Only the Earthling remains...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0017
rows.name:
It seems you also possess high-quality
weapons not inferior to this katana.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0018
rows.name:
For us Definia, and the grand plan
of the great Fortun-sama... I will
take them along with your life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0019
rows.name:
That's right... Tolba definitely died.
The one who knows that best is me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0020
rows.name: ...Hey? Who are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hehe, as expected, even the foolish Lars
won't fall for such a transparent trap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0022
rows.name:
How uninteresting. Even though I went through
the trouble of utilizing the farce I saw you
play out on the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0023
rows.name:
Wh... Who are you? Why are
you doing this to us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0024
rows.name:
My duty is to collect excellent weapons.
And you happened to possess this katana.
...That is all there is to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0025
rows.name:
The Earthling over there also seems
to possess high-quality weapons not
inferior to the Lars' katana.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0026
rows.name:
For us Definia, and the grand plan
of the great Fortun-sama... I will
take them along with your life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0027
rows.name:
I don't understand the meaning of
anything you're saying at all, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0028
rows.name:
If things turn out like this,
it makes it easier! I'll take
down the Verdes in the back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075405_MSG0029
rows.name:
[ST:playername]! You strike that one! Let's
scatter these guys with our power![ST:wait ]
